mapper.insert: INSERT INTO access_logs (cv_id, ip_address, user_agent, browser, operating_system, device_type, referer, location_country, location_city) VALUES (#{cvId}, #{ipAddress}, #{userAgent}, #{browser}, #{operatingSystem}, #{deviceType}, #{referer}, #{locationCountry}, #{locationCity})
mapper.select: SELECT id, ip_address, user_agent, browser, operating_system, device_type, referer, location_country, location_city, accessed_time FROM access_logs WHERE cv_id = #{cvId} ORDER BY accessed_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM access_logs WHERE cv_id = #{cvId}
SELECT COALESCE(device_type, 'Unknown') AS label, COUNT(*) AS count FROM access_logs WHERE cv_id = #{cvId} GROUP BY device_type
SELECT COALESCE(browser, 'Unknown') AS label, COUNT(*) AS count FROM access_logs WHERE cv_id = #{cvId} GROUP BY browser
